response.justification: While Bogdan demonstrates exceptional software engineering talent and recent senior-level experience at top-tier companies, he fundamentally misses the role's minimum C++ requirement (only 6-12 months of professional C++ experience versus 8 years required). His background is primarily in web/product infrastructure and backend systems rather than cloud compute platforms, hardware architecture, or low-level systems work. The distributed systems expertise is relevant but insufficient to offset the critical gaps in the core technical prerequisite and specialized infrastructure platform leadership.
strengths: Proven experience building distributed systems at massive scale (millions of HTTP requests/second at Dunnhumby with microservices architecture)
Recent staff-level roles at Stripe and Shopify demonstrating current technical seniority and broad system design capability
Established mentoring track record through workshops, courses, and community knowledge-sharing initiatives
concerns: Critical minimum qualification gap: ~6-12 months of professional C++ experience versus required 8 years
No demonstrated leadership building or owning cloud compute platforms or infrastructure-focused products
Limited evidence of hands-on work with compute technologies, storage systems, hardware architecture, or specialized cloud infrastructure
